creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I can confirm that this works correctly. I'm guessing that it is a result of the transition to llvm15 in CURRENT.

I would suggest to Gleb that there be a note to UPDATING that the old port should be deleted and the port be re-installed:
# pkg delete -f gstreamer1-plugins-bad

I really should have tried deleting the port, but I was afraid of all of the things that might be broken with the large number of ports that depend on 'bad'.

Thanks!
